scope: GSC-only analysis (55 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-13, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com) plus keywords-master.json. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: 'bariatric surgery counseling' hit #1 (was 14.4 on 2026-05-07, 1.6 mid-June) - the flagship head term now tops Google.
Core local terms hold the #2-3 tier: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at 2.0 and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' at 2.0 (up from 25.3 in early May).
'san antonio bariatric center' jumped +14.4 positions to 16.0 (6 impressions), and 'bariatric counselor' improved +3.0 to 4.5.
The hydration blog post is the site's traffic engine: 23 clicks / 3,894 impressions at position 5.2; the self-esteem post adds 4 clicks / 575 impressions at 7.4.
Clicks rose to 7 in the latest snapshot vs 4 on 2026-07-09 and 2 on 2026-05-07, even as impressions fell.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 23 of 82 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 59 show none (down from 26/82 on 2026-07-09). This is a keyword count, NOT a page count - many keywords share one target page, and most formerly staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live (hygiene, not lost traffic). Only 2 of 50 distinct target pages in the tracker still point at staging URLs.

Visibility drift: impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 1,622 (2026-07-13) and impression-weighted avg position slid from 14.87 to 20.24 - the broader query set is surfacing at worse positions even while a few head terms improved.
CTR is near zero: 7 clicks on 1,622 impressions (~0.4%) in the latest snapshot. The GLP-1 medications guide (534 impressions, position 9.9) and cravings post (339 impressions, 9.7) earned 0 clicks.

Slipped commercial terms: 'weight loss counseling or therapy' -12.1 to 16.8 (5 impressions); 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' -8.4 and 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' -5.8, both to ~30.8 on 12 impressions each.
Caveat: many tracked positions rest on 1-2 impressions and swing day to day; treat single-impression deltas (e.g. 'holistic approach to weight loss' -17.3 on 2 impressions) as directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging-targeted targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their live www URLs so GSC can match them; if a staging-to-prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring a count from keyword data.

Fix CTR on high-impression blogs: add CTAs and internal links from the hydration (3,894 imp), sleep (777 imp), GLP-1 medications (534 imp, 0 clicks) and cravings (339 imp, 0 clicks) posts into the matching service pages (weight-loss counseling, medication/GLP-1 support).

On-page refresh for the slipped eating-disorder pair ('eating disorder therapist/counseling san antonio', both ~30.8 with 12 impressions each) and 'weight loss counseling or therapy' (16.8) - retitle/re-intro against current page-1 competitors.

Defend the #1-#3 core: keep 'bariatric surgery counseling' (#1), 'bariatric counseling san antonio' (#2) and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' (#2) fresh with internal links and FAQ schema for rich-result/AI-overview eligibility.
Investigate the impressions decline (2,447 to 1,622 since early May): check whether it's blog-query churn vs service-page loss, starting from the query-x-page joins in the latest GSC snapshot.
summary: Head terms are winning - 'bariatric surgery counseling' is #1 and both core San Antonio terms hold #2 - but total impressions are down ~34% since early May, avg position drifted to 20.2, and CTR sits near 0.4%. Top priorities: convert high-impression blog traffic with CTAs/internal links and refresh the slipped eating-disorder terms.
